title: The Love Letter
content: While cleaning an old drawer, Grace found a handwritten letter inside a small envelope. It was from Noah, who had been her best friend for years. The letter was never sent. In it, Noah wrote about how much he admired her kindness and how he had slowly fallen in love with her. Grace smiled as she read every word. That evening, she visited Noah with the letter in her hand. He looked surprised and a little embarrassed. Grace simply hugged him and whispered, “You should have given this to me sooner.”
